headline: Altria Expands on! PLUS Nationwide, Boosts Smoke-Free Push
summary: MO expands on! PLUS nationwide, accelerating its smoke-free push as demand for oral nicotine rises and innovation drives growth in the evolving portfolio.

headline: Best Stock to Buy and Hold Forever: Altria Group vs. Philip Morris International
summary: Marlboro has propped up these two tobacco giants for decades. However, the future will depend on each company's ability to pivot.
